title: Prism Intent Signal v0.1
description: Canonical JSON Schema for the Prism v0.1 intent envelope.

prism_id.description: Unique identifier for this intent signal.

timestamp.description: Timestamp when the intent was formed.

agent.description: Name or identifier of the agent or system generating the intent.

intent_summary.description: Human-readable description of the action the agent intends to take.

prism_version.description: Version of the Prism protocol used to form this signal.

examples.intent_summary: send_email to bob@example.com with quarterly report
